data.body: COMPLETION VERIFIER (inline): DD1 PASS — figma-url-parse.sh extracts keys for /design/, /file/, /proto/ formats. DD2 PASS — figma-auth.sh reads PAT from FIGMA_PAT env var with design.figma_pat config fallback. DD3 PASS — validate-config.sh accepts design.figma_pat without warnings. DD4 PASS — CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents design.figma_pat with description, accepted values, default, used-by. All tasks closed. Unit tests (integration): FP-URL-1..4 + FP-AUTH-1..3 all pass.
